name: Unplugg
description: Submit equally spaced or resampleable time-series observations to Unplugg and receive an asynchronous forecast through a webhook callback.

auth.hint: Request an Unplugg access token and send it in the x-access-token header. Store only the token value in Arthur MCP Secrets.

tools.name: create_forecast
tools.description: Submit historical time-series observations and a webhook URL, returning a job ID before the completed forecast is delivered asynchronously.

params.name: data
params.description: Time-series observations, each with a Unix-seconds timestamp and numeric value.

params.name: callback
params.description: HTTPS webhook URL that will receive forecast and job_id when processing finishes.

params.name: forecast_to
params.description: Unix-seconds timestamp through which to forecast; if omitted, output length defaults to one eighth of the input point count.
